subcodes.first_line: Your letter, which was adorned with wondrous mention of the Lord of Lords, hath reached this Repository of Tribulation and Treasury of Tests [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه آنجناب که ببدایع ذکر رب الارباب مزین بود بر مکمن بلا و مخزن ابتلا واصل
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @chastisement and requital, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
